Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 015. Bring Your Tribute! (CT 53 311)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
oo beginning broken away

(Beginning destroyed)

o 1'1'

[x x x x x] ⸢LÚv⸣.[x x x x x]

o 2'2'

[x x x x x]-u-ni EN [x x x x x]

o 3'3'

[x x x KUR.gam]-bu-li ⸢x⸣+[x x x x]

(3) [... Gam]bulu [......] tribu[te ...... you will re]turn [......] your [......] you did not send [the ... o]f this land [to me].

o 4'4'

[x x x x] ma-da-⸢at⸣-[tú x x]

o 5'5'

[x x ta-sa]-aḫ-ḫu-⸢ra⸣ [x x x]

o 6'6'

[x x x]-⸢ba⸣-ku-nu ⸢ta⸣-[x x x]

o 7'7'

[x x x] ⸢ša? KUR?⸣ ḫa-an-ni-⸢e?⸣ [x x]

o 8'8'

[ina UGU-ḫi]-⸢ia⸣ la tu-še-bi-⸢la⸣-[ni]

o 9'9'

[ú-ma-a] ⸢an⸣-nu-rig a-sa-⸢ap⸣-[rak-ku-nu]

(9) I am writing to you right [now]: do not [...... t]o the people, but take your [tribut]e and come to me! [I am going to w]rite ... [about the tr]ibute of Ellipi, [they too will bring] their tribute.

o 10'10'

[x x a]-⸢na⸣ UN-MEŠ la ta-[x x]

o 11'11'

[ma-da-at]-⸢tú⸣-ku-nu i-ṣa al-⸢ka⸣-[ni]

o 12'12'

[ina UGU ma]-⸢da⸣-te ša KUR.il-li-[pa]

o 13'13'

[x x la-áš]-pu-ra ma-da-tú-šú-[nu]

o 14'14'

[x x x ina] UGU mḫum-bé-e [x x]

(14) As to Humbê [of Bit-Zualza, what I wrote in] my previous [letter ......

o 15'15'

[ša ina e-gír-ti]-⸢ia⸣ pa-ni-it-⸢te⸣

o 16'16'

[x x x x x x x x] ⸢x⸣+[x x x]

rest broken away

(Rest destroyed)

Reverse
rr destroyed

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P313726/.
